holdings.infoBox: CGMM is an equity ETF with a total of 117 individual holdings. The top holdings are CAPITAL GROUP CENTRAL CASH FUN CAPITAL GROUP CNTRL CSH M stock at 3.15%, Bloom Energy at 2.58%, RenaissanceRe Holdings at 2.01%, Exelon at 1.92%, and Comfort Systems USA at 1.88%.

overview.description: The Capital Group U.S. Small and Mid Cap ETF (CGMM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is actively managed, investing primarily in equity-type securities of small and mid-cap companies in the US. The fund aims for capital growth CGMM was launched on Jan 14, 2025 and is issued by Capital Group.

data.title: Navigating the Small-Cap ETF Disconnect
data.text: There has been a visible disparity between the performance of U.S. small-caps and U.S. large-caps so far this year. What hasn't been too visible is a lot of investor interest in the action.
